title: One Pot Beef, Bean & Lentil Ragú
description: A hearty one-pot pasta with ground beef, cannellini beans, and lentils in a rich tomato sauce. High protein, high fiber, and ready in under 30 minutes of active cooking.

ingredients.name: black pepper, red chili flakes, Italian seasoning
canned cannellini beans in vodka sauce
ingredients.notes: or plain cannellini beans + 1 cup store-bought vodka sauce + 1 Tbsp olive oil

ingredients.name: whole milk skyr or Greek yogurt

steps: In a pot over high heat, add olive oil, garlic, and tomato paste. Cook for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add ground beef and cook, breaking up with a spoon, until browned.
Add spices, cannellini beans, and lentils. Cook for 3 minutes.
Add bone broth, water, and salt. Bring to a simmer.
Add pasta and cook for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until pasta is tender and liquid is mostly absorbed.
Stir in yogurt, parmigiano reggiano, and fresh herbs. Serve immediately.

notes:
Nutrition (per serving): 660 cal | 47g protein | 80g carbs (17g fiber) | 17g fat

If you can't find cannellini beans in vodka sauce, use a plain 15oz can of cannellini beans + 1 cup store-bought vodka sauce + 1 Tbsp olive oil.
